summary: Completed frontend testing of new AdminUnifiedPayments page and verified EMI tab removal from AdminBillPayments. All 11 test cases passed. AdminUnifiedPayments correctly displays all 3 request types (Bank Redeem, EMI Pay, Savings Vault) in unified list with bulk approval functionality. AdminBillPayments no longer shows EMI Payment tab (moved to unified dashboard).
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ AdminUnifiedPayments.js - Route /admin/unified-payments at App.js line 345 works correctly
✅ AdminUnifiedPayments.js - Fetches from 3 APIs in parallel: bank-redeem/requests, rd/admin/redeem-requests, bill-payment/requests?payment_type=emi
✅ Stats cards show Pending/Approved/Rejected with PRC and INR values
✅ Type filter dropdown has all 4 options: All Types, Bank Redeem, EMI Pay, Savings Vault
✅ Date range filters (From/To) with date inputs present
✅ Sort order toggle (Newest First/Oldest First) works
✅ Select All Pending button works and shows bulk action bar
✅ Bulk Approve Selected with UTR input works
✅ Bulk Reject Selected with reason input works
✅ Individual approve/reject visible when request expanded with UTR and rejection reason inputs
✅ AdminBillPayments.js - EMI Payment tab successfully REMOVED (Line 55-56 removes loan_emi from SERVICE_CATEGORIES)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing pending Bank Redeem request from SANTOSH SHAMRAO AVHALE
context_for_next_testing_agent: AdminUnifiedPayments page fully implemented and tested at /admin/unified-payments. Features: unified list of Bank Redeem + EMI Pay + Savings Vault requests, stats cards with PRC/INR, type/date/status filters, sort toggle, checkboxes for pending, Select All Pending, Bulk Approve/Reject with UTR and reason inputs. AdminBillPayments at /admin/bill-payments no longer shows EMI Payment tab - only shows Mobile Recharge, DTH Recharge, Electricity Bill, Credit Card.

admin_unified_payments.header: Unified Payment Dashboard - All payment requests in one place

stats_cards.pending: Shows count, PRC amount, INR amount with yellow styling
stats_cards.approved: Shows count, PRC amount, INR amount with green styling
stats_cards.rejected: Shows count, PRC amount, INR amount with red styling
stats_cards.all_total: Shows total count with blue styling

filters.type_filter: Dropdown with All Types, Bank Redeem, EMI Pay, Savings Vault
filters.sort_order: Toggle button for Newest First / Oldest First

request_list.row_display: Type badge, user name, email, PRC amount, INR amount, status, date
request_list.expandable: Click to expand and see details + actions

expanded_details.bank_redeem: Shows Account Holder, Account Number, IFSC Code, Bank Name, PRC Amount, INR Value
expanded_details.actions: UTR/Transaction Reference input + Approve & Mark Paid button + Rejection Reason input + Reject & Refund PRC button

bulk_actions.select_all_pending: Button to select all pending requests
bulk_actions.bulk_bar: Shows selection count, UTR input for all, Approve Selected, Reject Selected buttons
bulk_actions.bulk_reject: Shows rejection reason input when Reject Selected clicked

admin_bill_payments.emi_tab_removed: ✅ VERIFIED - EMI Payment tab no longer appears
admin_bill_payments.stats: Today's Summary and All Time Summary sections with Pending/Approved/Rejected counts
